title: what is the most secure account settings offered  for " high profile clients"?
creator: trahden57
content:
I am a T.I.(targeted individual) and under constant attack online. Every device and account has been hijacked by bad actors, for over 2 decades.This form of digital harassment is maddening to a person who hasn't the knowledge to defend their self. 

 Every time I attempt to establish any account  it's taken from me,  I don't get verification code  or whatever.  When I  finish registering,  my password is changed and I'm prompted to " see your IT Admin."  I own my device and have no parental controller or IT tech! I have an unknown (to me ) number of accounts  I did not establish.  These. Are in my legal name and many more in aliases.  Some how within a few days tops, I'm identified and the accounts get sync with my other hacked profiles. I can't work without a phone and email. I can't afford pro help. Is there an AI agent that can secure my digital life and monitor my accounts and devices? Any help could be life changing,  possibly even  life  saving. I wonder if this post will even leave my phone, or if I will be able to open the email or return to this community forum? Technically ill,digitally  dieing, millionth message and last empty bottle! PEACE.
